caption: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a teal long-sleeved blouse and a delicate silver necklace, stands behind a white lectern in a minimalist room with plain white walls. She is positioned in front of several microphones and a black computer monitor. At the top of the scene, the logo "mediasite by cornerstone" is visible. Initially, the woman looks downward toward the lectern. As time progresses, she shifts her gaze and turns her head to her right, looking toward someone or something off-screen. Her expression is neutral to slightly smiling. She remains standing behind the lectern throughout the sequence, with her hands resting near the surface. The lighting is bright and even, and the background remains static, with only the woman's head and gaze moving from a downward position to a rightward orientation.
